rendering_patterns.name: Continuous Field Computation
rendering_patterns.description: Continuous field computations including noise, reaction-diffusion, fire simulation, or coupled oscillators.

rendering_patterns.name: Centre-Origin Radial Expansion
rendering_patterns.description: LED values computed as a function of distance from centre points (LED 79/80), propagating outward.

rendering_patterns.name: Centre-Origin Wave Propagation
rendering_patterns.description: Wavefronts expanding or contracting from/to centre with sinusoidal or triangular profiles.

rendering_patterns.name: Discrete Particle System
rendering_patterns.description: Discrete particle-like elements with position/velocity state, bouncing or moving independently.

rendering_patterns.name: Multi-Wave Interference
rendering_patterns.description: Superposition of multiple wave sources creating interference patterns, moire, or standing waves.

rendering_patterns.name: Mathematical Geometric Structures
rendering_patterns.description: Mathematical geometric shapes including fractals, superformulae, spirographs, cellular automata.

rendering_patterns.name: Direct Audio Waveform Visualisation
rendering_patterns.description: Direct rendering of audio waveform samples or spectrum data onto LED positions.

migration_patterns.name: Static Utility Functions (dominantChromaBin12 + chromaBinToHue)
migration_patterns.description: Duplicated static functions for argmax bin selection and bin-to-hue mapping. Replaced by ChromaUtils.h circularChromaHueSmoothed().

migration_patterns.name: Inline Argmax + Linear EMA (m_dominantBinSmooth)
migration_patterns.description: Inline argmax loop with linear exponential moving average on circular bin index. Linear EMA caused rainbow sweeps at B/C boundary. Replaced by circularChromaHueSmoothed().

migration_patterns.name: Raw Inline Argmax (No Smoothing)
migration_patterns.description: Raw argmax loop producing immediate hue jumps with no temporal smoothing. Every hop could produce a full-frame colour discontinuity. Replaced by circularChromaHueSmoothed().

migration_patterns.name: LGP Experimental Audio Pack (selectMusicalHue + Schmitt Trigger)
migration_patterns.description: Pack-level shared hue selection using selectMusicalHue() with Schmitt trigger hysteresis between chord-root and bin-derived paths. Uses dominantNoteFromBins() with circular weighted mean via kCos/kSin, and smoothHue()/smoothNoteCircular() for temporal smoothing.
migration_patterns.before_code_signature: N/A (built with circular chroma fix incorporated)

wave_propagation.description: Wavefronts expanding or contracting from/to centre

colour_derivation_methods.name: Circular Chroma Hue (Smoothed)
colour_derivation_methods.description: Weighted circular mean of 12 chroma bins with circular EMA temporal smoothing

colour_derivation_methods.name: Chroma Hue (Legacy or Pack-specific)
colour_derivation_methods.description: Chroma-derived hue using pack-specific functions (e.g. selectMusicalHue, dominantNoteFromBins)

colour_derivation_methods.name: Palette Position Mapping
colour_derivation_methods.description: LED position or computed value mapped to palette index

audio_coupling_modes.name: RMS Intensity Mapping
audio_coupling_modes.description: Audio RMS level drives brightness or effect radius

audio_coupling_modes.name: Beat Event Trigger
audio_coupling_modes.description: Beat detection events trigger discrete visual events

audio_coupling_modes.name: Frequency Band Mapping
audio_coupling_modes.description: Specific frequency bands drive specific visual parameters

audio_coupling_modes.name: Chromagram Hue Derivation
audio_coupling_modes.description: Chroma bins drive palette hue selection

gaps.context: Audio coupling mode could not be determined from code markers
Effect slot removed from registry, no source file
Effect is marked audio_reactive but uses internal timer-based lub-dub pattern, not ControlBus audio data. Audio coupling is self-generated timing.
